dict.string: Fazi is a file manager and needs access to your Desktop to browse and manage files there.
Fazi is a file manager and needs access to your Documents to browse and manage files there.
Fazi is a file manager and needs access to your Downloads to browse and manage files there.
Fazi needs access to removable volumes to browse and manage files on external disks.
Fazi needs access to network volumes to browse and manage files on network shares.
